rdf:Description.dc:description: CSV-derived audit counterpart to j3-effect-saturation. Plots frequency decline |Δf₁/f₁,0| vs S/D for the dry series (T1, T2) using the canonical Welch/free-decay frequencies recorded in analysis1/results/natural_frequencies.csv. Saturated series (T4, T5) are included on panel (b) as baseline-only bars because the source CSV does not carry SD values for those tests, so their slopes are not computable without auxiliary test-plan data.
